LanguageData.FB_DeepMawTrap.label: deep maw trap
LanguageData.FB_DeepMawTrap.description: A hidden maw trap that suddenly opens, swallows pawns standing above it, and digests organic victims into hemogel.
LanguageData.FB_DeepMawTrapEmbryo.label: deep maw trap embryo
LanguageData.FB_DeepMawTrapEmbryo.description: An immature trap organ that will grow into a deep maw trap.
